phase_01.status_text: T 38.9°C. HR 112. BP 102/68. Blood cultures drawn; results pending.

phase_02.status_text: SCr 2.3 mg/dL (up from 1.9). MRI: osteomyelitis of 5th metatarsal with adjacent abscess.
